attacks.name: Voltage Burst
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken. This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: V-Force
attacks.effect: If you have 4 or fewer Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

rules:
Move up to 2 Energy from your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

attacks.name: Protect Charge
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Piercing Drill
attacks.effect: This attack also does 60 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Rock Tumble
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Echoed Voice
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Echoed Voice attack does 80 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Command the Grass
attacks.effect: You may search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Command the Grass
attacks.effect: You may search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Aerial Ace
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.
They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.

attacks.name: Do the Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.

attacks.name: Tail Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

flavorText: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.

attacks.name: Return
attacks.effect: You may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

flavorText: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.

attacks.name: Add On
attacks.effect: Draw 4 cards.

attacks.name: Swift Flight
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females' flying abilities surpass those of the males.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It can return to its Trainer's location regardless of the distance separating them.

attacks.name: Scout
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand.

flavorText: Each follows its Trainer's orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.

attacks.name: Cross-Cut
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an Evolution Pokémon, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Axe Blast
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Basic Pokémon, it is Knocked Out.

flavorText: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.

attacks.name: Boundless Power
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

flavorText: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they've been fighting.

attacks.name: Gather Strength
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.

attacks.name: Righteous Edge
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Metal Arms
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.

attacks.name: Finishing Blow
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses.

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: Blades comprise this Pokémon's entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.
Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.

attacks.name: Hard Gears
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.

attacks.name: Hard Gears
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 10 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

attacks.name: Wild Lances
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.

attacks.name: Tighten Up
attacks.effect: Your opponent discards 2 cards from their hand.

attacks.name: Cursed Slug
attacks.effect: If your opponent has 3 or fewer cards in their hand, this attack does 120 more damage.

flavorText: They never allow prey to escape. Their jaws are so powerful, they can crush the body of an automobile.

attacks.name: Tighten Up
attacks.effect: Your opponent discards 2 cards from their hand.

flavorText: They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms.

attacks.name: Tighten Up
attacks.effect: Your opponent discards a card from their hand.

flavorText: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping.

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 90 more damage.

flavorText: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies.

attacks.name: Poison Spray
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.

attacks.name: Abundant Harvest
attacks.effect: Attach a Basic Fighting Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”

attacks.name: Stone Edge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: Competing for territory, Crustle fight viciously. The one whose boulder is broken is the loser of the battle.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon can easily melt holes in hard rocks with a liquid secreted from its mouth.

attacks.name: Shoulder Throw
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 less damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.

attacks.name: Swing Around
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.

attacks.name: Hammer Arm
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavorText: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.
It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.
It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It could give a car running aboveground a good race.

attacks.name: Double Smash
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage for each heads.

flavorText: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.

attacks.name: Best Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.

attacks.name: Calm Mind
attacks.effect: Heal 40 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: It can manipulate an opponent's memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers.

attacks.name: Slight Shift
attacks.effect: Move an Energy from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon to another of their Pokémon.

flavorText: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent's brain, causing unendurable headaches.

attacks.name: Cellular Evolution
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once.
They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.

attacks.name: Dream Calling
attacks.effect: You may search your deck for any number of Fennel cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Sleep Pulse
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Asleep. Heal 30 damage from it.

flavorText: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.

attacks.name: Thunder Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Buzz Flip
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 100 damage for each heads.

flavorText: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.

attacks.name: Hold Still
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: While one alone doesn't have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: The energy made in its cheeks' electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding.

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot. This attack does 20 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.

attacks.name: Continuous Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Sheer Cold
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't use attacks.

flavorText: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.

attacks.name: Snotted Up
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't use attacks.

flavorText: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.
The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.

attacks.name: Big Bite
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.

attacks.name: Ancient Seaweed
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each Item card in your opponent's discard pile.

flavorText: Restored from a fossil, this Pokémon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: This attack does 70 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.

flavorText: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.

flavorText: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.

flavorText: They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.
The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavorText: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.
When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona's fire provided a replacement for the sun.

attacks.name: Peck Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Smashing Headbutt
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.

attacks.name: Dangerous Reaction
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 120 more damage.

flavorText: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.

attacks.name: Toxic Spore
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It lures people in with its Poké Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poké Ball is unknown.
These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.

attacks.name: Lively Needles
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon was healed during this turn, this attack does 100 more damage.

flavorText: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.

attacks.name: Bemusing Aroma
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.
Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavorText: This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.

attacks.name: Wrap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.
It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.

rules: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides Colorless Energy.  If this card is attached to a Basic Pokémon, this card provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Supporter card you find there and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

Move up to 2 Energy from your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Heal 40 damage from each of your Pokémon.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.

Flip 2 coins. If both of them are heads, search your deck for a Basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

You may play any number of Item cards during your turn.

attacks.name: Wild Lances
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.

rules:
The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is ColorlessColorless less.

You may attach any number of Pokémon Tools to your Pokémon during your turn. You may attach only 1 Pokémon Tool to each Pokémon, and it stays attached.

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached.

attacks.effect: For each of your Benched Pokémon, search your deck for a card that evolves from that Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Evo-Lariat
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 more damage for each of your Evolution Pokémon in play.

flavorText: When Reuniclus shake hands, a network forms between their brains, increasing their psychic power.

attacks.name: Cellular Evolution
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once.
They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.

attacks.name: Dream Calling
attacks.effect: You may search your deck for any number of Fennel cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Sleep Pulse
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Asleep. Heal 30 damage from it.

flavorText: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.

attacks.name: Voltage Burst
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 more damage for each Prize card your opponent has taken. This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Charge
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Lightning Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Disaster Volt
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.

attacks.name: Thunder Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Buzz Flip
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 100 damage for each heads.

flavorText: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.
They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.

attacks.name: Hold Still
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: While one alone doesn't have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

flavorText: The energy made in its cheeks' electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding.

attacks.name: Blizzard Burst
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon for each Prize card your opponent has taken. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Drag Off
attacks.effect: Switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot. This attack does 20 damage to the new Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.

attacks.name: Continuous Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Sheer Cold
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't use attacks.

flavorText: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.

attacks.name: Snotted Up
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't use attacks.

flavorText: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.
The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.

attacks.name: Big Bite
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

flavorText: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.

attacks.name: Ancient Seaweed
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each Item card in your opponent's discard pile.

flavorText: Restored from a fossil, this Pokémon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: This attack does 70 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.

flavorText: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.

flavorText: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each of your Pokémon in play that has the Round attack.

flavorText: They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.
The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavorText: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.
When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona's fire provided a replacement for the sun.

attacks.name: Peck Off
attacks.effect: Before doing damage, discard all Pokémon Tools from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.

attacks.name: Searing Flame
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Smashing Headbutt
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.
When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.

attacks.name: V-Force
attacks.effect: If you have 4 or fewer Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

attacks.name: Dangerous Reaction
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, this attack does 120 more damage.

flavorText: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.

attacks.name: Toxic Spore
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: It lures people in with its Poké Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poké Ball is unknown.
These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.

attacks.name: Lively Needles
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon was healed during this turn, this attack does 100 more damage.

flavorText: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.

attacks.name: Bemusing Aroma
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned. If tails, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.

attacks.name: Hide
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavorText: The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.
Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavorText: This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.

attacks.name: Command the Grass
attacks.effect: You may search your deck for up to 3 cards and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

rules: Pokémon ex rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Wrap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes, and it then attacks with a vine whip.
It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.
